arts.ttl: Liverpool can win Premier League title next week as Arsenal slip up again
arts.sum: Liverpool have inched closer to winning the Premier League without even playing as Arsenal dropped yet more points this weekend. The Gunners were held to a 1-1 draw by Brentford at home on Saturday after Thomas Partey’s second-half opener was cancelled out by Yoane Wissa. Kieran Tierney also had a goal ruled out for offside […] The post Liverpool can win Premier League title next week as Arsenal slip up again first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Report reveals Liverpool plan for 25-year-old target after Mo Salah extension
arts.sum: Liverpool remain keen on signing Alexander Isak from Newcastle United at the end of the season. The 25-year-old has been outstanding for Newcastle this season and has 24 goals and five assists to his name in all competitions. According to TBR Football, Liverpool are determined to persuade the Swedish international striker to join the club […] The post Report reveals Liverpool plan for 25-year-old target after Mo Salah extension appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: All change at Chelsea, Man Utd and Liverpool after €110m deal
arts.sum: Juventus are confident that they will be able to keep Kenan Yildiz and Andrea Cambiaso after a fresh injection of cash from their owners, according to Italian media. Due to their lavish spending last year, it had been thought that Juventus would have to make some potentially painful sacrifices this summer, with the likes of Kenan Yildiz and Andrea Cambiaso among the players attracting attention.

arts.ttl: When Liverpool can win the Premier League title as Arsenal drop points against Brentford
arts.sum: The latest Liverpool news as Arsenal's 2-2 draw against Brentford has given the Reds a clear path to the Premier League title.

arts.ttl: Arsenal slip up again to edge Liverpool closer to Premier League title
arts.sum: Thomas Partey’s 61st-minute opener being cancelled out by Yoane Wissa 13 minutes later.

arts.ttl: Jonathan David future: New favourite 'emerges' for Lille marksman who is 'also wanted' by Man United, Liverpool
arts.sum: Inter Milan allegedly emerge as leading contenders to sign Lille forward Jonathan David on a free transfer at the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 1-1 Brentford: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Liverpool edge closer to title
arts.sum: Yoane Wissa cancels out Thomas Partey's opener as Arsenal slip further away from the Premier League title with a 1-1 draw at home to London rivals Brentford.

arts.ttl: Arsenal drop points to Brentford as Liverpool edge closer to title - 5 talking points
arts.sum: ARSENAL 1-1 BRENTFORD: Thomas Partey had given Arsenal the lead just after the hour mark, but Yoane Wissa grabbed Brentford's equaliser with 16 minutes left
